Fusion

Fusion (or fusing) is the act of combining familiars (a.k.a fams)[1] and other materials to create a new, stronger (fused-)familiar. For a total overview of the fusions and components try the Fusion By Location page

Before you begin you must locate and obtain the necessary fusion schematics:

  • Regular schematics are only obtainable from Zone Dungeons and Raids that contain the related familiars used as components in the schematic.[2][3]
  • World Boss, Invasion and Expedition schematics are only obtainable from their World Boss, Invasion Event or Expedition Event areas regardless of the components.
  • Sometimes random schematics can be purchased, or rewarded as prizes.[4]

Once obtained you may see or use them (recipe for combining familiars and fusion-specific materials for use) by selecting the FAMILIARS icon and then the FUSION button; or by speaking to Prof. Haile in town.

Fused-familiars obtain at least one new passive ability and have a +5% stat percentage increase from normal familiars based on their rarity (65% for common, 75% for rare, 85% for epic, 95% for legendary, and 100% for mythic, respectively).

Stables: A familiar gains 2% of the player's total stats per upgrade (up to a maximum of 10%) in the stables. The extra stats are distributed proportionally among the familiar's stats. Like normal familiars, fused-familiars' stats scale on percentages based on the player's total stats (Power +  Stamina + Agility ).

Regular Fusions[]

Dialogue[]

Upon the first visit to the fusion page:

  • Prof. Haile: EGAD! You found a schematic! Now all you need are the ingredients!

Notes[]

  1. ↑ Advanced: Sometimes instead of normal/base-level/unfused familiars your previously fused-familiars will be used for fusion, such as in Walkom. ("Fused-familiars" are often referred to as just "familiars" in this wiki, or by their individual names in chat rooms.)
  2. ↑ Example 1: the Shrampz schematic (using Shrump + Grampz) can be obtained from (Zone 1/Dungeon 2) Z1D2 (Shrump location), Z1D4 (contains all Z1 familiars), Z2D2 (Grampz location), and Z2D4 (contains all Z2 familiars).
  3. ↑ Example 2: the Gelbos schematic (using Gelvins and 3 Robot Sprockets) can be obtained from (Raid 5) R5 plus 3 Robot Sprockets.
  4. ↑ Warning: Some of these will only generate Regular schematics.
  5. ↑ Jump up to: 5.0 5.1 5.2 5.3 5.4 5.5 5.6 A fusion that can also be captured in dungeons. Only applies to Gobby fusions (confirmed by Devs)
  6. ↑ a.k.a. Red Svirnan

Fandom Apps

Take your favorite fandoms with you and never miss a beat.
Bit Heroes Wiki is a Fandom Games Community.

Privacy Preference Center

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences, or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect. The information does not usually identify you directly, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your right to privacy, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to learn more and change our default settings. Blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer.
Privacy Policy

Manage Consent Preferences

Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

Performance Cookies

Always Active

These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.

Functional Cookies

Always Active

These cookies enable the website to provide enhanced functionality and personalisation. They may be set by us or by third party providers whose services we have added to our pages. If you do not allow these cookies then some or all of these services may not function properly.

Targeting Cookies

Always Active

These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

Social Media Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are set by a range of social media services that we have added to the site to enable you to share our content with your friends and networks. They are capable of tracking your browser across other sites and building up a profile of your interests. This may impact the content and messages you see on other websites you visit. If you do not allow these cookies you may not be able to use or see these sharing tools.

Cookie List

  • label
Consent Leg.Interest
label
label
label
